reviews.comment:
Una excelente atención por parte de los empleados, dentro del ACA tienen cafetería y una sección de productos regionales. Consumimos café con leche, tostados de miga y una porción de tarta de atún y todo muy rico, no es caro y te llevan la comida a la mesa. Baños muy limpios, y el personal muy amable.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from the staff. Inside the ACA, they have a café and a section with regional products. We had coffee with milk, toasted bread, and a slice of tuna tart, and everything was delicious. It's not expensive, and they bring the food to your table. The restrooms were very clean, and the staff was very friendly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtN2ZMU3RRRRAB
